caption: The video features a person performing on stage, holding an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. The performer is dressed in a white shirt with a decorative black vest that has intricate blue and red patterns. They have their hair tied back and are wearing glasses. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a concert hall or a similar venue. The audience is visible in the foreground, with several people watching attentively. The logo "ORCA" appears in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the event or organization associated with the performance. The atmosphere seems calm and focused, with the performer deeply engaged in their music.
